synopsis: The ultimate enforcer, Darth Maul, continues his single-handed decimation of the ranks of the galactic crime syndicate Black Sun. As lieutenant after lieutenant falls under the swift blade of Maul's cold wrath, Black Sun pulls itself together to discuss how to deal with this new threat. Aware of Black Sun's plan, Maul shows up at Black Sun headquarters just as the in-fighting starts, and all hell breaks loose—Maul-style! Be sure not to miss this action-filled third chapter in the long-awaited Darth Maul series, written by comics superstar Ron Marz (Green Lantern, Batman/Tarzan) and with
title: Darth Maul (2000) #3
